Race 1 Race 2 Race 3 Race 4 Race 5 Race 6 Race 7 Back to top

For more information on new NSW Apprentice Riding Weights feature click here

From 19 Sept 2018, an extra column “True Weight” will be displayed for NSW races.
TRUE WEIGHT : The true weight indicates what the individual horse handicap weight is by using the benchmark if no minimum was applicable.

From 1 September 2022, 1.5% of prizemoney will be paid to the Equine Welfare Fund, with 1% paid to the Jockeys Welfare Fund.

Race 1 - 2:10PM SHARP OFFICE CLASS 1 & MAIDEN PLATE (2100 METRES) Times displayed in local time of Race Meeting
Of $27,000.1st $13,950, 2nd $5,050, 3rd $2,600, 4th $1,300, 5th $825, 6th $600, 7th $500, 8th $500, 9th $500, 10th $500, Equine Welfare Fund $405 , Jockey Welfare Fund $270.
Class 1, Set Weights, Apprentices can claim.
BOBS&BOBS Extra Bonus available: $5,625

Field Limit: 12 + 4 EM

12 PARFUMIER
3 year old bay filly (15-9-2022) Sire: Exceed And Excel Dam: Fragonard (New Approach (IRE)) View Pedigree Report

Owners: D Treacy & Ms G Robins
